title: Force Directed Graph Layout
description: Interactive simulation of force-directed graph placement algorithm. Demonstrates how physical simulation with attractive and repulsive forces creates visually pleasing graph layouts through iterative refinement.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Force-Directed Layout
Graph Visualization
Physics Simulation
Graph Drawing
Network Layout
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of force directed graph layout
Explore force directed graph layout through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of force directed graph layout to solve problems
Test understanding of force directed graph layout through interactive exercises
